title: @codewithimanshu: Claude Code now works free. Unlimited. No subscription 🤯 The tool is called free-claude-code. You get a free NVIDIA API
summary: @codewithimanshu: Claude Code now works free. Unlimited. No subscription 🤯 The tool is called free-claude-code. You get a free NVIDIA API
whyItMatters: Claude Code now works free. Unlimited. No subscription 🤯 The tool is called free-claude-code. You get a free NVIDIA API key, point Claude Code to localhost, and the proxy converts your Anthropic API calls to NVIDIA NIM format. 40 requests per minute. No bill. Ever. Supported models: → Kimi K2 → GLM 4.7 → MiniMax M2 → Devstral → And more Streams thinking to…
